variables.input:
data 
record(limit = 1),
record(limit = 5),
record(limit = 10),
record(limit = 50),
record(limit = 100)

0.title: Database instances by vendor
0.description: Vendors of Extensions Framework 2.0–monitored database instances.
0.query:
//Getting all DB entities
data json:"[]"
| append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`]
| append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:postgres_instance`]
| fields entityType = entity.type

//Mapping human readable DB types
| join [
  data record(entityType="sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance", display_name="Oracle Database"),
       record(entityType="sql:db2_instance", display_name="IBM DB2"),
       record(entityType="sql:sql_server_instance", display_name="MS SQL"),
       record(entityType="sql:snowflake_account", display_name="Snowflake"),
       record(entityType="sql:postgres_instance", display_name="PostgreSQL"),
       record(entityType="mysql:instance", display_name="MySQL"),
       record(entityType="sql:hana_db_database", display_name="HANA DB"), 
       record(entityType="mariadb:instance", display_name="MariaDB")   
], on: { entityType }, kind: leftOuter

| fieldsAdd dbType=coalesce(right.display_name, "Other")

//Create chart by type
| summarize by:{dbType}, count()

10.title: Database services health
10.query:
// Fetch entities in Databases app
data json: "[]"
| append [
    fetch `dt.entity.sql:postgres_instance`
    | fieldsAdd vendor_icon = "postgre"
]
| append [
    fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`
    | fieldsAdd vendor_icon = "sql-microsoft"
]
| filterOut isNull(id)
| fieldsKeep  vendor_icon
| dedup vendor_icon

//Joining with services using the supported vendor icon
| join [
  fetch dt.entity.service
  | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
  | fields vendor_icon = icon[primaryIconType], id, entity.name
], on:{vendor_icon}, fields:{entity.name, id}

// Check any active problem
| lookup [
  fetch dt.davis.problems
  | filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
  | expand affected_entity_ids
], sourceField:id, lookupField:affected_entity_ids
| fieldsAdd affected = if(isNotNull(lookup.affected_entity_ids), "problems", else: "healthy")
| fields affected, id, name = entity.name, event.id = lookup.event.id, event.kind = lookup.event.kind

12.title: Database services
12.query:
// Fetch entities in Databases app
data json: "[]"
| append [
    fetch `dt.entity.sql:postgres_instance`
    | fieldsAdd vendor_icon = "postgre"
]
| append [
    fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`
    | fieldsAdd vendor_icon = "sql-microsoft"
]
| filterOut isNull(id)
| fieldsKeep  vendor_icon
| dedup vendor_icon

//Joining with services using the supported vendor icon
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.service
    | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
    | fields vendor_icon = icon[primaryIconType] 
  ], on:{vendor_icon}, kind:inner
| summarize count()

15.title: Database services with problems
15.description: Amount of database services with active Davis problems.
15.query:
// Fetch entities in Databases app
data json: "[]"
| append [
    fetch `dt.entity.sql:postgres_instance`
    | fieldsAdd vendor_icon = "postgre"
]
| append [
    fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`
    | fieldsAdd vendor_icon = "sql-microsoft"
]
| filterOut isNull(id)
| fieldsKeep  vendor_icon
| dedup vendor_icon

//Joining with services using the supported vendor icon
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.service
    | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
    | fields vendor_icon = icon[primaryIconType], id, entity.name
], on:{vendor_icon}, fields:{entity.name, id}

// Check any active problem
| lookup [
    fetch dt.davis.problems
    | filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
    | expand affected_entity_ids
], sourceField:id, lookupField:affected_entity_ids
| fieldsAdd affected = if(isNotNull(lookup.affected_entity_ids), "yes", else: "no")
| fields affected, id, name = entity.name, event.id = lookup.event.id, event.kind = lookup.event.kind
| summarize countif(affected=="yes")

16.title: Top $TopLimit database statements by number of calls

17.title: Database services by vendor

19.title: Database instances availability
19.description: Status of Extensions Framework 2.0–monitored database instances.
19.query:
// Fetch entities
data json: "[]"
| append [
    fetch `dt.entity.sql:postgres_instance`
    | lookup [
        timeseries avg(`postgres.uptime`),
        by: {`dt.entity.sql:postgres_instance`},
        from: -10m
        | fieldsAdd db_status_postgresql = "UP"
    ],
    sourceField: id,
    lookupField: `dt.entity.sql:postgres_instance`,
    fields: {db_status_postgresql}
]
| append [
    fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`
    | lookup [
        timeseries avg(`sql-server.databases.state`),
        by: {`dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`, db_status_mssql = database.state},
        from: -10m
    ],
    sourceField: id,
    lookupField: `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`,
    fields: {db_status_mssql}
]
| fieldsAdd status_of_db = coalesce(db_status_oracle, db_status_db2, db_status_mssql, db_status_postgresql, db_status_mysql, db_status_mariadb, db_status_hanadb)
| fieldsRemove db_status_oracle, db_status_db2, db_status_mssql, db_status_postgresql, db_status_mysql, db_status_mariadb, db_status_hanadb

//Mapping into 3 cathegories      
| fieldsAdd unified_status = if(in(status_of_db, {"OPEN", "OPEN MIGRATE", "ACTIVE", "ONLINE", "UP", "AVAILABLE", "AVAILABLE", "YES"}), "AVAILABLE")
| fieldsAdd unified_status = if(in(status_of_db, {"OFFLINE", "EMERGENCY", "NO"}), "ERROR", else: unified_status)
| fieldsAdd unified_status = if(in(status_of_db, {"STARTED", "MOUNTED", "QUIESCE_PEND", "QUIESCED", "ROLLFWD", "ACTIVE_STANDBY", "STANDBY", "RESTORING", "RECOVERING", "RECOVERY PENDING", "SUSPECT", "STARTING", "STOPPING", "UNKNOWN"}), "WARNING", else: unified_status) //| append
| filterOut  isNull(unified_status)
| summarize count = count(), by: {unified_status}

21.title: Total database instances
21.description: Total amount of Extensions Framework 2.0–monitored database instances.
21.query:
// Fetch entities
data json:"[]"
| append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:postgres_instance`]
| append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`]
| summarize count = count()

23.title: Query latency overview (span duration)

24.title: Execution status (spans)

27.title: Database queries per second
27.query:
timeseries count=sum(dt.service.request.count, rate: 1s), by: { dt.entity.service }
| fieldsAdd entityName(dt.entity.service)

| lookup [
  fetch dt.entity.service
  | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
], sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:id

| filterOut isNull(lookup.entity.name)
| filterOut isNull(lookup.id)

| sort arraySum(count) desc

30.title: Unhealthy database instances
30.description: Extensions Framework 2.0–monitored database instances with potentially problematic availability.
30.query:
// Fetch entities
data json:"[]"
| append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:postgres_instance`]
| append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`]
| fields entityName = entity.name, entityId = id
| filterOut isNull(entityId)
| fields entityId

//Check if any of the entities have problems
|  lookup [
  fetch dt.davis.problems.snapshots
      | sort timestamp
      | summarize {
        event.status = takeLast(event.status),
        dt.davis.is_duplicate = takeLast(dt.davis.is_duplicate),
        affected_entity_ids=takeLast(affected_entity_ids)
      }, by: {event.id}
      | expand affected_entity_ids
      | filter isNull(dt.davis.is_duplicate) OR not(dt.davis.is_duplicate)
      | filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
      | summarize problemsCount = count(), by:{affected_entity_ids}],
      sourceField: entityId,
      lookupField: affected_entity_ids,
      fields:{problemsCount}
| filter problemsCount > 0
| summarize count()
